title: Monday Workflows
excerpt:
Greeting, 
I know the workflow functionality is new in Monday but it would be fantastic if the workflows can be a part of the template

posts.author: shadow79 (Andre Cornette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greeting,

I know the workflow functionality is new in Monday but it would be fantastic if the workflows can be a part of the template

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Andre,

With the new Workspace Template feature a workflow can be included in a template. When the board(s) used in the workflow is included in the workspace as well, the references would be changed to the newly created board when you use the template.

I couldn’t find any specific documentation on this new feature yet so here’s a screenshot of where I found the option a few weeks ago:

image469×526 46.5 KB

Btw: if you lack certain functionality in workflows, let me know. We’ve recently released our app Workflow Extensions and are constantly looking for added value!

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: shadow79 (Andre Cornette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you, Maarten, for the feedback! I will also review the app you mentioned.

Andre Cornette - IS&T Manager | PMO
